scores.correctness_notes: Response is detailed and mostly correct but uses the older 'bases' format (with build-on/run-on sub-keys) instead of the current 'base'/'platforms' format shown in the gold standard. The gold standard uses 'base: ubuntu@24.04' and 'platforms: amd64:' which is the newer Charmcraft 3.x syntax.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'bases' format with 'build-on/run-on' is an older syntax that was replaced by 'base'/'platforms' in newer Charmcraft versions. While not entirely fabricated, presenting this as the current structure when the gold standard uses the newer format is a meaningful inaccuracy. The 'upstream-source' field under resources and the 'python-requirements' part plugin field may also not exist exactly as shown.
